_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=QA-MEM Beta-A pre-registered query fixture; committed BEFORE any benchmark runs; gold labels derived mechanically by tools/qa_kg/analysis/derive_gold.py (category=graph_structural|curator_specified|mechanical) or by blind LLM (category=llm_blind, cross_domain only); thresholds pre-committed at docs/specs/QA_MEM_BETA_DECISION_MATRIX.md; no changes to gold after seeing results (N1 constraint). -->
description: 38 pre-registered queries for Beta-A validation. Category distribution: provenance(6), contradiction(8), domain(6), authority(8), lifecycle(2), cross_domain(4), edge_case(4). Gold source per category: provenance/contradiction/domain/lifecycle=graph_structural (derive_gold.py BFS/SQL); authority=curator_specified (expected primary ID hand-picked per query, committed here); cross_domain=llm_blind (anonymized-ID prompt graded by Claude Haiku/Opus via SDK); edge_case=mechanical (empty result / vacuous exclusion / filter plumbing).

queries.query_text: What primary sources ground the Haramein scaling diagonal cert?
queries.rationale: BFS via derived-from from target cert; node_type='Axiom' filtered. Expect 3 sc:haramein_2013_* SourceClaims. Tests that primary material grounding a cert is surfaced when queried with cert-descriptive text.

queries.query_text: What primary source grounds the Keely structural ratio cert?
queries.rationale: derive_gold strips axiom:A2 (search cannot surface axioms via query text). Residual gold = sc:keely_law_18_atomic_pitch. If derive_gold output has only axioms after stripping, this query becomes N-A and gets flagged.

queries.query_text: What primary source grounds the Keely triune-force cert?
queries.rationale: derive_gold strips axiom:A1. Residual gold = sc:keely_law_11_triune_force.

queries.query_text: What does the Keely dominant-control cert build on?
queries.rationale: No axiom endpoints on this cert's derived-from edges. Gold = sc:keely_law_1_matter_force_atomoles + sc:keely_law_11_triune_force.

queries.query_text: What primary claims ground the Levin cognitive-lightcone cert?
queries.rationale: Gold = sc:levin_2019_computational_surface + sc:levin_2019_scale_free_cognition. Biology-domain provenance.

queries.query_text: Provenance of the sixteen-identities cert?
queries.rationale: Single derived-from edge. Gold = sc:parker_prop_vii_circumference_radius.

queries.query_text: Keely Law 17 transformation structural reclassification dispute
queries.rationale: Query tokens 'Keely Law 17 transformation' match sc title (21-octave compass); 'Law 17 structural reclassification' matches obs body (Vibes Category 2 → Category 1). Lexical pre-flight: both sides ≥ 2 shared non-stopword tokens.

queries.query_text: Hull pi 20612 6561 Lindemann transcendental
queries.rationale: '20612 6561' specific to sc; 'Lindemann transcendental' specific to obs; 'pi' shared. Both endpoints surface.

queries.query_text: F never prime unity set roots
queries.rationale: 'F never prime' → sc body; 'unity set' + 'F prime' → obs body. reason=true exemplar.

queries.query_text: SVP Law 13 parenthetical labels mapping
queries.rationale: All four tokens present in both title and both bodies. Cleanest lexical match of the 8 pairs.

queries.query_text: SVP choromosomes chromosomes OCR typo
queries.rationale: Misspelling 'choromosomes' in sc; correct 'chromosomes' + 'OCR' in obs. Classic OCR-error pair.

queries.query_text: Philomath 72-year precession 25920 correction
queries.rationale: '72' + '25920' + 'precession' shared. obs body has '28920' typo the correction identifies.

queries.query_text: SVP C identity a² h² versus a² b² verified
queries.rationale: sc body literal 'a2 - h2'; obs body 'a²−b²' (NFKD → a2,b2). Pre-flight uses NFKD normalization so query 'a² h² b²' matches both. Query retains superscripts — FTS5 unicode61 strips them similarly.

queries.query_text: Briddell proton decomposition 1836 729 typo
queries.rationale: 'Briddell' + 'proton decomposition' + '1836' + '729' present in both. obs adds 'line 1286' + 'typo'.

queries.query_text: Levin biology source claims cognition
queries.rationale: Gold = all source_claim nodes with domain=biology (6 expected). Tests the candidate-pool domain filter (Phase 4.5 R10) on biology subcorpus.

queries.query_text: Wildberger Parker Hull geometry source claims
queries.rationale: Gold = all source_claim nodes with domain=geometry (20 expected). Large gold set; per-query hit@5 binary because k=5 cannot fit 20 items.

queries.query_text: Briddell FST physics source claims
queries.rationale: Gold = all source_claim nodes with domain=physics (15 expected). Primarily Briddell Part 2 claims.

queries.query_text: Iverson Philomath qa_core source claims
queries.rationale: Gold = all source_claim nodes with domain=qa_core (18 expected). Iverson + Philomath + Briddell addendum corpus.

queries.query_text: Haramein RSF source claims holographic mass
queries.rationale: Gold = all source_claim nodes with domain=rsf (15 expected). Haramein 2013 equations corpus.

queries.query_text: Keely SVP source claims sympathetic physics
queries.rationale: Gold = all source_claim nodes with domain=svp (5 expected). Smallest domain; full gold fits in top-5 if filter works.

queries.query_text: Wildberger chromogeometry transcends Klein
queries.rationale: Curator anchor: specific Wildberger 2008 claim. Primary SourceClaim should appear in top-3.

queries.query_text: Haramein holographic mass equation 9
queries.rationale: Curator anchor: specific equation citation. Primary should beat any derived cert mentioning 'holographic'.

queries.query_text: Keely atomoles Law 1 matter force
queries.rationale: 'atomoles' is a Keely-specific coinage; unique token should strongly disambiguate.

queries.query_text: Iverson Halley comet quantum number worked example
queries.rationale: Curator anchor: specific Iverson QA-2 worked example.

queries.query_text: Briddell plenum core elements FST
queries.rationale: Curator anchor: specific Briddell Part 2 claim about plenum.

queries.query_text: Parker proposition III circle geometry
queries.rationale: Curator anchor: Parker 1874 Prop III. Tests primary-domain surfacing when a derived cert (circle_impossibility) competes.

queries.query_text: Levin 2022 TAME technological approach mind everywhere
queries.rationale: Curator anchor: Levin 2022 TAME definition. Tests that a new corpus addition ranks above a derived cert alias.

queries.query_text: Philomath digital root definition base 10 nine
queries.rationale: Curator anchor: Philomath's digital-root definition. Tests that domain=qa_core primary wins over derived [202] cert.

queries.query_text: KG consistency invariants current version
queries.rationale: Gold (current) = cert:fs:qa_kg_consistency_cert_v4. Anti-gold (superseded) = v1/v2/v3. Gate: v4 rank < min(v1,v2,v3) rank in top-5. Tests lifecycle_factor=0.5 on superseded.

queries.query_text: Graph consistency certificate KG1 KG13 gates
queries.rationale: Same target_topic as L01; different phrasing exercises lifecycle ordering under query variation (KG11/12/13 tokens are v4-only in body text, biasing FTS5 toward v4 even before lifecycle_factor — gate still checks v4 outranks superseded).

queries.query_text: What primary sources connect QA integer structure to biological cognition?
queries.rationale: Bridges qa_core (Iverson/Philomath QA framework) and biology (Levin cognition). No single graph edge spans this relationship — requires semantic judgment. Graded blind by LLM on title+body with anonymized IDs.

queries.query_text: How do Keely's sympathetic-physics laws relate to Haramein's scaling framework?
queries.rationale: Bridges svp (Keely) and rsf (Haramein). Tests whether ranker surfaces both author-canonical primary claims when the query spans both.

queries.query_text: Integer bounds in both Wildberger's geometry and Briddell's field-structure physics
queries.rationale: Bridges geometry and physics domains. 'Integer bounds' is a QA-mapped semantic theme, not a domain column.

queries.query_text: Digital root Philomath vs chromogeometry Wildberger — arithmetic vs geometric structure
queries.rationale: Bridges qa_core (Philomath digital root) and geometry (Wildberger chromogeometry). Structural domain split does not capture the semantic cross-cut.

queries.query_text: xyzqrstuvw_no_such_token_exists_anywhere_in_corpus
queries.rationale: Zero FTS5 matches expected; ranker must return []. Tests empty-pool path.

queries.query_text: Keely
queries.rationale: Valid query token with invalid domain filter. candidate_pool SQL AND domain=? excludes all; ranker returns []. Tests filter plumbing without corpus interference.

queries.query_text: Bateson learning levels cognition
queries.rationale: No primary Bateson SourceClaim in corpus (derived-only). With min_authority='primary' the derived cert:fs:qa_bateson_learning_levels_cert_v1 must be EXCLUDED. Expected: empty or primary-only top-5. Tests min_authority ladder.

queries.query_text: Keely
queries.rationale: valid_at filter with far-future date. All Keely nodes have valid_until='' — should all pass. Expected: same result set as no valid_at filter. Tests R4 plumbing even while no valid_until populated anywhere (honestly N-A for discrimination).
